title: Gomesa pauloensis
taxonomy: Gomesa pauloensis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Gomesa, which is a group of orchids native to the Americas. Gomesa pauloensis is further classified as part of the subgenus Cohniella, which includes some species of Gomesa. The species is closely related to other orchids in the same genus and family. Further classification of Gomesa pauloensis may involve specific ranks such as species group or section.
